official_functions.role: Construct the official Play clientbound player_info_remove fixture
Write, decode, and observe the official UUID-list body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns player_info_remove to packet id 0x45.
The official Play clientbound protocol codec dispatches the player_info_remove id to ClientboundPlayerInfoRemovePacket.
The official player_info_remove body is a VarInt-prefixed UUID list.
The fixture uses UUID values only and does not require GameProfile, session, chat, or initialized player-list state.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded UUID list, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove GameProfile/session/player-list state, Play entry, render readiness, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer GameProfile/session/player-list state, Play entry, render readiness, or client-load completion.
